stories.title: **Dodgers Shut Out Cubs 6-0 — Win Series, End Cubs' 10-Game Streak**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Cubs' 10-game win streak: OVER.

Dodgers shut out Chicago 6-0 Sunday night. Wrobleski 6 scoreless. Ohtani HR No. 6 at 109.8 mph.

Cubs left 12 on base. 0-for-8 with RISP. The defending World Series champs reminded them who runs the NL.

#LetsGoDodgers #FlyTheW

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani: 6 home runs in 26 games.

Sunday's shot off the Dodger Stadium scoreboard went 109.8 mph exit velocity.

The Cubs' 10-game win streak is over. The Dodgers won the series 2-1.

#Dodgers #Ohtani #MLB

stories.title: **Murakami at 11 HRs — Tied for MLB Lead, Trade Extension Talks Looming**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami: 11 HRs. .394 OBP. .992 OPS. 19 RBIs.

Through 25 games. As a first-year MLB player.

He's TIED with Yordan Alvarez for the MLB HR lead.

The White Sox have NOT started extension talks yet.

#WhiteSox #Murakami #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The MLB HR race through 25 games:

Yordan Alvarez: 11 HRs
Munetaka Murakami: 11 HRs

Both sluggers are carrying struggling teams (Astros 10-16, White Sox 10-15) almost entirely on their backs.

This is the best HR race baseball has had in years.

#MLB #Astros #WhiteSox

stories.title: **Mason Miller's Scoreless Streak: 34.2 IP — 6.1 Away From All-Time Reliever Record**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Mason Miller (Padres) has now thrown 34 2/3 consecutive scoreless innings.

The all-time MLB reliever record: 41 innings (Gregg Olson, 1988).

Miller is 6 1/3 innings away.

Nobody is talking about this. But they should be.

#Padres #MLB

stories.title: **Paul Skenes Takes Perfect Game Into 7th — Pirates' Ace Is Back**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Paul Skenes took a perfect game into the 7th inning on Friday.

20 consecutive batters retired. Jake Bauers singled with 2 outs in the 7th to break it.

7 IP, 1 H, 0 R, 7 K. Pirates won 6-0.

The reigning NL Cy Young winner is back. 🔥

#LetsGoBucs #MLB
